criteria.budgetStrategy: Driving trip, off-site or value lodging, limited park days, and careful ticket selection. Disney resort packages are unlikely under this budget for six people unless there is an unusually strong promotion.
preferredResortTypes: Value resort if major promotion appears
mustHave: Works for a three-year-old, six-year-old, teenagers, and two adults
Total estimate close to 2000 to 3000 dollars
niceToHave: One character meal option if the budget survives

agent.summary:
```json
{
  "summary": "For the Bell Family's Disney World trip driving from Texarkana/Genoa with 6 members, the most realistic and budget-aligned option is driving with off-site hotel lodging and 1 Disney park day, estimated at $2,850, within the target $2,000–$3,000 budget. Options with more park days or Disney resort stays exceed $3,000 unless major discounts materialize. Current ticket and hotel deals require manual checking as no strong price signals have been detected automatically.",
  "bestMove": {
    "id": "drive-offsite-one-park-day",
    "title": "Drive + off-site hotel + 1 Disney park day",
    "estimatedTotal": 2850,
    "summary": "Most realistic path to Disney inside the $2,000–$3,000 target. It keeps the magic, but limits park tickets.",
    "action": "Watch for hotel rooms under $150/night and ticket promos. Book only when the real total stays under $3,000.",
    "label": "Strong deal",
    "sourceUrl": "https://disneyworld.disney.go.com/special-offers/"
  },
  "watchItems": [
    {
      "id": "drive-good-neighbor-two-days",
      "title": "Drive + Good Neighbor hotel + 2 park days",
      "estimatedTotal": 3750,
      "summary": "Better Disney feel, but likely above budget unless a hotel or ticket discount appears.",
      "action": "Use as stretch target. Alert only if total drops near $3,000.",
      "label": "Worth watching",
      "sourceUrl": "https://disneyworld.disney.go.com/special-offers/"
    },
    {
      "id": "drive-disney-value-promo",
      "title": "Drive + Disney value resort promotion",
      "estimatedTotal": 4300,
      "summary": "Best experience, weakest budget fit. This only becomes interesting if Disney posts a major public offer.",
      "action": "Watch official Disney special offers. Do not book unless the full math changes.",
      "label": "Worth watching",
      "sourceUrl": "https://disneyworld.disney.go.com/special-offers/"
    }
  ],
  "recommendations": [
    "Prioritize the 'Drive + off-site hotel + 1 Disney park day' option and monitor hotel prices closely to secure rooms under $150/night.",
    "Check Disney official special offers regularly for ticket discounts or major promotions that may enable better deals.",
    "Avoid booking options exceeding the $3,000 max total budget unless a substantial price reduction is confirmed.",
    "Look for hotels offering free breakfast and shuttle service to enhance family convenience within budget.",
    "Target travel months with lower crowds as identified (January, February, May, September, November, early December) to enhance the experience.",
    "Verify all pricing details before booking to ensure clarity and avoid surprises, especially given the possibility of price fluctuations."
  ],
  "textAlertDraft": "Disney Alert: The 'Drive + off-site hotel + 1 Disney park day' trip is currently estimated at $2,850, within your budget. Please verify hotel and ticket prices today before booking to lock in the deal."
}
```
